creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
Two things:
1. I had supplied the wrong command in the How-To-Repeat field,
   it should be really 'sudo -u root COMMAND';
2. there is ports/131373 that talks about the same issue, but
   provides update path to the 1.7.0 and has no VuXML entry.
   I had somehow missed this PR during the search via the PR
   database before submission of this report.
-- 
Eygene
